quality.completeness: Complete; provides all necessary mechanical text.

mechanics.core_effect: Modifies the duration or ending conditions of the Barbarian's Rage.
mechanics.comparison_to_standard: This feature replaces the standard rules where Rage ends after 1 minute, or if the Barbarian is no longer raging, falls unconscious, or chooses to end it early (even if the time limit hasn't expired).

analysis.suggestions: None needed. The data accurately reflects the standard D&D 5e feature.
